name: transitCoverage
_note: urban-planning.transitCoverage is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/urbanplanning.js, PATH-3, hyphenated key). DETERMINISTIC walk-shed analysis: each stop gets a mode-based walk radius (bus 400m, brt 600m, rail/ferry 800m; unknown → bus 400m), a circular catchment area in acres (π r² / 4046.86), and parcels are counted served via a haversine-lite point-in-circle test. An empty/absent stops array rejects with 'stops array required' (never throws). Reads input from artifact.data merged over params; no DB, no network. parcelsServed is always ≤ parcelsEvaluated. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not driven by the macro-assassin; pinned by server/tests/urban-planning-lens-macros.test.js.
